_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

.claude/settings.json.benefit: Adds a protection so the record of an approved update cannot be altered, keeping the approve-then-apply safety check trustworthy.

.claude/upgrade_notice.sh.benefit: The start-of-session update check now uses the same trusted source as the manual check, so the two always agree.

wizard/skills/check-for-updates.md.benefit: Updating is now a single safe step — the assistant refreshes the update tool and applies the update together, instead of running two separate commands.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.2 -> v0.6.3 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The three updated operating-layer files are delivered; your edits to operating-layer files are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Operating-layer content fixes from v0.6.2: the check-for-updates skill's apply step now uses the combined operator-reach command; settings.json denies edits to the approved-update contract; the session-start update notice shares the manual check's registry source. No new sections or capabilities; foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.2.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.2.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.3/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.2.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.1 -> v0.6.3 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The next-phase skill and the three v0.6.3 operating-layer files are delivered; your edits are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.1 straight to v0.6.3 (an operator on v0.6.1 who never took v0.6.2). Delivers the v0.6.2 next-phase approval-drill content fix PLUS the v0.6.3 operating-layer content fixes (combined operator-reach apply command, approved-update-contract deny, shared update-notice source). All operating-layer content changes to existing files; no new sections or capabilities; foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.1.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.1.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.3/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.1.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.0 -> v0.6.3 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). Operating-layer files changed across v0.6.1, v0.6.2 and v0.6.3 are merged (your edits kept) or saved for review; the health-check skill is delivered additively.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.0 straight to v0.6.3 (an operator still on v0.6.0). Delivers the v0.6.0 -> v0.6.1 operating-layer additions (an additive section in operating_discipline.md, the pause-skill change, and the health-check skill) PLUS the v0.6.2 next-phase fix PLUS the v0.6.3 operating-layer content fixes. Classified minor-additive because the combined delta includes v0.6.1's additive capabilities. Foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.0.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.0.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.3/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.0.
